app_subtitle: Local-first cashflow, imports, and planning for one household.
status_ready: SvelteKit, Cloudflare Pages, Tailwind, Paraglide, Vitest, Playwright, and LayerChart are ready.
privacy_note: No authentication, no raw CSV storage, and no external AI calls in V1.
next_step_body: Add the Cloudflare D1 binding, migrations, and isolated database test utilities.
